description: Catastrophic smoke thresholds. These are intentionally loose and should be tightened once stable baselines are collected on CI hardware.

update_encoding_round_trip.reason: Update encoding smoke should never approach 100ms per iteration.

text_sequential_insert.reason: Sequential text inserts should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

text_append.reason: Append-heavy text workloads should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

text_prepend.reason: Prepend-heavy text workloads should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

text_middle_insert.reason: Middle-insert text workloads should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

text_random_insert_delete_format.reason: Random text edits with formatting should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

text_fragmented_delta_render.reason: Fragmented text delta rendering should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

delta_apply_shallow.reason: Shallow delta application should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

delta_render_shallow.reason: Shallow delta rendering should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

delta_render_deep.reason: Deep delta rendering should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

array_random_insert_delete_nested.reason: Array insert/delete workloads with nested types should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

map_set_delete_conflicts.reason: Map conflict workloads should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

xml_tree_insert_delete_stringify.reason: XML tree insert/delete/stringify workloads should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

sync_v1_encode_apply_merge_diff.reason: V1 sync encode/apply/merge/diff should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

sync_v2_encode_apply_merge_diff.reason: V2 sync encode/apply/merge/diff should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

sync_update_format_convert.reason: Update format conversion should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

sync_pending_out_of_order_recovery.reason: Pending out-of-order update recovery should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

metadata_id_set_algebra.reason: IdSet algebra should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

metadata_id_map_algebra.reason: IdMap algebra should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

advanced_relative_position_create_resolv.reason: Relative position creation and resolution should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

advanced_snapshot_create_restore_contain.reason: Snapshot create/restore/containment should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

advanced_undo_redo_stack.reason: Undo/redo stack workloads should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

advanced_attribution_diff_render_accept_.reason: Attribution diff/render/accept/reject/filter workloads should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.

advanced_gc_enabled_vs_disabled.reason: GC enabled/disabled delete-heavy workloads should remain comfortably below 100ms per iteration.
